privileged_info_summary: This task uses a real Nx Witness VMS system developed by Network Optix, a legitimate commercial video management platform. The system is configured to run on https://localhost:7001 with admin credentials admin/Admin1234!. Three virtual test cameras (Parking Lot Camera, Entrance Camera, and Server Room Camera) are created during environment setup using the testcamera tool included with Nx Witness. The task requires updating camera credentials via the PATCH /rest/v1/devices/{id} REST API endpoint using Bearer token authentication obtained from /rest/v1/login/sessions. The verifier checks that: (1) each camera's credentials are correctly updated in the API state, and (2) a log file at /home/ga/camera_credential_update.log is created with the specified format containing entries for all three cameras. Nx Witness version 5.1.5.39242 is the primary version used, with 6.0.1.39873 as a fallback option.
